title: Bharuch Slapgate: Gujarat AAP MLA Chaitar Vasava Slaps Victim’s Kin, Gets Stronger Slap In Return Outside Factory Tragedy Site | VIDEO
description: A clash erupted in Jhagadia GIDC in Gujarat's Bharuch, as AAP MLA Chaitar Vasava and the family of blast victim Rakesh Vasava allegedly exchanged slaps during his visit to the site of the April 23 explosion that killed one and injured over 10.
